reasoning: On February 20, 2025, the market odds on Polymarket for the New York Knicks to win the Eastern Conference were 14%. The Knicks have had a very solid regular season so far in 2024-2025, sitting at around 37-19 by late February and maintaining a top-3 seed in the challenging Eastern Conference alongside the Boston Celtics and Cleveland Cavaliers. However, they are currently dealing with concerning injuries to key players, notably OG Anunoby and Mitchell Robinson, which could hamper their playoff potential if not fully resolved. Although they have played well recently (winning 5 of their last 7 games heading into March), the Boston Celtics remain the overwhelming favorites to win the East, and the Cleveland Cavaliers are also strong contenders. Without any dramatic shifts in the balance of power in the East over the last two weeks, the 14% probability remains an accurate reflection of their chances to navigate past both Cleveland and Boston in a seven-game playoff series.
